fields.User: User whose away state will be watched. On avatars, may be set by an AvatarUserReferenceAssigner component.
fields.AwayMaterial: Material to display when the user is away.
fields.Renderer: Mesh renderer component whose materials should be replaced
fields._oldMaterials: Backup of the renderer's original material list. Written automatically when "Away" state is triggered.

methods.SetAway: Stores the renderer's material list in ``_oldMaterials`` and replaces them with the ``AwayMaterial``.
methods.OnTestAway: Stores the renderer's material list in ``_oldMaterials`` and replaces them with the ``AwayMaterial``.

usage: This is used to make a customized or fancier way of stating that you are focused away into another world.
